title: Speed Horse
description: Speed Horse adds a "Swiftness" enchantment for horse armor with 5 levels, making your horse faster with each level. Works with all horse armor types — apply it using an anvil with an enchanted book.
body:
# Speed Horse

Speed Horse adds a new "Swiftness" enchantment for horse armor. Each level increases your horse's movement speed, up to level 5. Perfect for players who want their horses to keep up with the action.                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  Enchantment Levels:
  - Swiftness I - Slight speed boost                                                                                                                                                                                                
  - Swiftness II - Noticeable increase                                                                                                                                                                                              
  - Swiftness III - Fast travel speed                                                                                                                                                                                               
  - Swiftness IV - Very fast                                                                                                                                                                                                        
  - Swiftness V - Blazing fast (~34 blocks/sec)                                                                                                                                                                                     
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  Works with all horse armor types (leather, iron, gold, diamond). Apply using an anvil with an enchanted book.

[Requires Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
